query: Have 3 agents debate whether we should keep this Go service monolithic or split it into workers.
Use an agent chatroom to pressure-test whether our admin export should run inline in the API or as a background job, with an architect, a security reviewer, and a pragmatist.
Debate whether our admin export should run inline in the API or via a background worker, then give me the final recommendation.
Poll 10 agents independently and give me the consensus ranking.
Write a prompt contract with goal, constraints, format, and failure conditions.
Explain what a chat room is.
